svg.text: New England Select Board / Town Meeting Form of Government · Offline-First · PowerSync + Supabase
Gov title = display label, not permission
Filter by board, date, item type
Access Model — Four App Roles + Public Portal
Maine FOIA / Records Retention (locked approved minutes)
Robert's Rules (loose baseline — motion / seconder / vote)
Town Meeting Manager · Maine-first, New England-expandable · 56 development sessions across 3 phases
Target: Towns 1,000–5,000 · SaaS pricing $600–$1,200/year · Open core model
